title: meconopsis wilsonii subsp. wilsonii
intro: Meconopsis wilsonii subsp. wilsonii, also known as the Himalayan blue poppy, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Papaveraceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Meconopsis wilsonii subsp. wilsonii are said to include the potential relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as the reduction of fever. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
